base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dr_eggman — a character (boss) from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Dr. Robotnik/Eggman — 7 boss-mech-variants (wrecking ball/flamethrower/drill/electrosphere/spike-trap/final-mech). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
